steps.title: Read the boundary line
steps.content:
The boundary line has $y$-intercept $6$ and slope $-4$.
$$y=-4x+6$$

steps.title: Use the shaded side
steps.content:
The shaded region is below the line, so use less than.
$$y<-4x+6$$

steps.title: Match the inequality
steps.content: This boundary and shading direction give the correct inequality. The answer is A.
